emails.subject: Knezevich v. Nepco
emails.body: Knezevich v. Nepco I just sent you this case. Please coordinate w/ David

emails.subject: RE: Knezevich v. Nepco
emails.body: RE: Knezevich v. Nepco Thanks....I was just on the phone with David. I'm going up to his office next week on another matter.

emails.subject: RE: Knezevich v. Nepco
emails.body: RE: Knezevich v. Nepco On Friday, I spoke with Dave Lund about the case referenced above. According to David, to the extent this is a personal injury matter and, therefore, an insurance claim, Bob Vote is the guy to manage it. In fact, Bob is already aware of the matter and on top of it. Bob, can you confirm that you are the right person to handle this and that you are on it? If there is anything I need to do, please let me know. Thanks.
